supportTraining: Seller will provide up to 30 days of transition support including introduction to intermediary contacts, payroll process walkthrough, and weekly supervisor meeting handoff. The existing supervisor manages all day-to-day operations independently and will remain with the business, minimizing transitio
description:
This is a profitable, semi-absentee commercial cleaning operation serving the Northwest Arkansas and River Valley markets. The business holds recurring contracts through signed Master Service Agreements with two established intermediaries, serving Fortune 500 end clients including a national medical center, a major utility company, and a national bank.
An experienced supervisor manages all day-to-day field operations independently. The current owner is involved approximately 8-10 hours per week handling payroll, a weekly check-in, occasional emergencies, and sales. All staff including the supervisor are staying with the business, eliminating rehiring risk for a new owner.
The business generates approximately $13,007 per month in contracted recurring revenue backed by signed agreements, with consistent gross margins around 37% across three years of operation. Two regional supply hubs in Northwest Arkansas and the River Valley are included in the sale, fully stocked and operational.
This is a turnkey acquisition for a buyer looking for a stable, low-involvement income-producing business in one of the fastest-growing markets in the country. The current owner is available for a transition period to ensure a smooth handoff.
